subject: LU-16097 tests: skip quota subtests in interop

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this
values.+1: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

messages.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Cannot detect any functional changes in this patch

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 1:

added this follow-up patch to run some interop testing.

Firstly, I'm not even sure that "mdsversion" and "ossversion" are valid interop test parameters (instead of "serverversion"), but we'll see.

The test of interest is ossversion=2.15.3, which does not handle the new quota revoke functionality.  We don't usually allow sites to run with major differences in server versions, but this can happen for some time during an upgrade, so it can't totally explode even if the new revoke functionality is not working yet.

I expect that the mdsversion=2.15.3 test will fail because the new subtest doesn't have a version interop check, but I wanted to see if there are other reasons why the testing would fail in this case.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Strangely, the ossversion=2.15.3 test failed sanity-quota test_84:

  sanity-quota test_84: @@@@@@ FAIL: pool grant is not set as insane value 

but it didn't fail test_86 that was added for the previous patch. 

The mdsversion=2.15.3 test session crashed in test_14:

  BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 00000000000000f8
  RIP: 0010:qmt_site_recalc_cb+0x305/0x7a0 [lquota]

A version check should also be added for that.

parents.subject: LU-13306 mgs: support large NID for mgs_write_log_osc_to_lov

commit.subject: LU-16097 tests: skip quota subtests in interop
commit.message:
LU-16097 tests: skip quota subtests in interop

Skip subtests in sanity-quota.sh to avoid interop test failures,
backdated to check all new tests since 2.14.0 for completeness.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-quota ossversion=2.15.3
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-quota mdsversion=2.15.3
Fixes: 513b1cdbca ("LU-16340 quota: notify only global lqe")
Fixes: d4978678b4 ("LU-15694 quota: keep grace time while setting default")
Fixes: 25a70a88c9 ("LU-13952 quota: default OST Pool Quotas")
Fixes: 188112fc80 ("LU-14300 quota: avoid nested lqe lookup")
Fixes: 8c19365416 ("LU-13971 quota: report Pool Quotas for a user")
Fixes: a4fbe7341b ("LU-14739 quota: nodemap squashed root cannot bypass quota")
Fixes: 3ffa5d680f ("LU-14740 llite: avoid project quota overflow")
Fixes: 29e00cecc6 ("LU-14696 llite: check read only mount for setquota")
Fixes: 789038c97a ("LU-15167 quota: fallocate send UID/GID for quota")
Fixes: 5fc934ebbb ("LU-15519 quota: fallocate does not increase projid usage")
Fixes: c9901b68b4 ("LU-13587 quota: protect qpi in proc")
Fixes: 61ec1e0f2c ("LU-15031 quota: reseed glbe in qmt_lvbo_udate")
Fixes: dfe7d2dd2b ("LU-16341 quota: fix panic in qmt_site_recalc_cb")
Fixes: 862f0baa7c ("LU-15097 quota: stop pool_recalc before killing pool")
Fixes: 61481796ac ("LU-15193 quota: expand QUOTA_MAX_TRANSIDS to 12")
Fixes: a2fd4d3aee ("LU-15880 quota: fix insane grant quota")
Fixes: 6c0b4329d0 ("LU-16339 quota: notify OSTs until lge_qunit_nu is set")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ife8bfd83d0f217c534f3b12b4c9d108d370ed6b7
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52009
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Sergey Cheremencev <scherementsev@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
